text:
Created attachment 235525
Update to version 4.0.5

Update to version 4.0.5.

Git diff attached. Additional git commands:
git rm files/patch-doc_Makefile
git rm files/patch-doc_source___templates_indexcontent.html
git rm files/patch-doc_source___util_cql.py
git add files/patch-bin_cqlsh
git add files/patch-test_conf_cassandra-murmur.yaml
git add files/patch-test_conf_cassandra-seeds.yaml
git add files/patch-test_conf_unit-test-conf_test-native-port.yaml

The updated maven repo must be manually copied to distfiles for patch testing and uploaded to LOCAL as part of the commit process. It is available at the following link:
https://drive.google.com/file/d/12sW-bAXUmEQCYxuT3viNq5nT8X5_QBJU
